race.comment: BRANNUM (3) stalked the speed and engaged in a thrilling finish when going under narrowly over the 1600m at Hawkesbury in this class on a heavy (8) surface. Can put these away today from the good gate. FELIS CHAUS (6) improved off his average first-up run with a fast finishing second over 1300m at Goulburn. Clearly come back stronger this prep and can hold a position from the sticky gate. AUTUMN BLONDE (1) returns from a 32 day let-up. Went back from the wide gate and like the way she savaged the line when fourth over 1400m at Wagga in BM66 class. Kept fresh and has soft track form. THUNDER LIGHTS (4) ploughed through the heavy (9) going to get off the mark as fav when scoring by 4.5 lens at Port Macquarie over 1509m. Claim helps and can surprise some of his more fancied rivals.
